channel.title: Journalism on Condado Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Journalism on Condado Lab

item.title: The News Sharing Gap: How Political Context Helps to Explain News Routines and Shareworthiness on SNSs
item.description: The article examines how political context helps explain news routines and shareworthiness on social networking sites, analyzing the gap between what news organizations publish and what audiences share.
